channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Pape to Newsmax: Better Iran Deal Unlikely
item.description: University of Chicago political science professor Robert Pape said Sunday on Newsmax that he sees little chance President Donald Trump will secure...

item.title: Hegseth: US Acting Now to Secure Hormuz
item.description: War Department Secretary Pete Hegseth said Sunday that the United States is already taking undisclosed actions to help ensure safe passage through the...

item.title: Holt to Newsmax: Iran Deal Is 'Surrender Terms'
item.description: Any memorandum of understanding between the United States and Iran should be viewed as "surrender terms" rather than a traditional negotiated agreement...

item.title: Trump marks 80th birthday, now second octogenarian sitting president: 'Seemed to utterly defy age'
item.description: President Trump turns 80 in office, becoming only the second sitting U.S. president to reach octogenarian status while allies praise his stamina.
